summary: Phase D (Support Tickets + Communications) end-to-end testing. 36/36 backend pytest passing covering: admin TOTP login, gating (admin vs non-admin/unauth on 7 endpoints), user-ticket CRUD + internal-note hiding, admin tickets list/filters/update/reply auto-flip, ticket-reports aggregates, macros CRUD, campaigns audience-preview (all/plan), campaign create+send with notification_log rows + double-send 400, email-templates (11 system), notification-log last_hour aggregates, newsletter subscribers. Frontend: full admin login w/ TOTP works, all 5 Phase D nav testids + all 16 ticket/campaign builder testids present, ticket reply submit succeeds and auto-flips status to waiting_on_user, priority change PUT works (toast: Updated), 3-step campaign builder navigates through all steps and reaches campaign-save-draft. /admin/email-templates, /admin/notifications, /admin/newsletter-subscribers render with their testids. Regression Phase A/B/C pages (/admin, /admin/users, /admin/decoder-log, /admin/anomaly-log, /admin/tool-stats, /admin/subscriptions, /admin/refunds, /admin/revenue) render without page errors (0 pageerror events).
critical_code_review_comments: Review_request mentions POST /api/admin/login and /api/admin/2fa/verify, but actual mounted routes are /api/admin/auth/login and /api/admin/auth/2fa/verify (admin_auth.py router prefix is /admin/auth). Existing tests + frontend use the correct paths; consider correcting the spec doc to avoid confusing future agents.

Campaign send (POST /api/admin/campaigns/{id}/send) iterates Mongo users in-process and synchronously fans out emails. Fine for the small test audience now, but will block the request thread for large audiences; recommend background task / queue before Phase E scale.
admin_phase_d.py is ~570 lines combining tickets + macros + campaigns + templates + notification log + subscribers. Approaching the 700-line split threshold — plan to break apart by feature soon.
Server-side impersonation read-block intentionally not enforced (per handoff note). Worth tracking as a known gap before public launch.
test_credentials: Admin super_admin: hello@techglove.com.au / AdminPass!2026 + TOTP secret CYB5PKTKR4F2JM4ACWIFTY2C67RUVUTI (pyotp.TOTP(secret).now()). User caregiver: cathy@example.com / testpass123. Both confirmed working in iter24.
seed_data_creation: Test fixtures create+cleanup TEST_ prefixed tickets/macros/campaigns. UI smoke also created one extra ticket via /api/tickets and cleaned via direct Mongo delete (TEST_ regex).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase D fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_admin_phase_d.py (36 tests, ~9s). Run: cd /app/backend && pytest tests/test_admin_phase_d.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/<file>.xml. For UI: pyotp.TOTP(users.totp_secret).now() for admin login; ticket detail testids confirmed live: ticket-thread, ticket-reply-form, ticket-reply-body, ticket-reply-submit, ticket-macro-select, ticket-internal-checkbox, ticket-priority-select, ticket-status-select, ticket-assign-me. Campaign builder testids confirmed: campaign-builder, campaign-name, campaign-audience, campaign-preview-btn, campaign-next-1, campaign-subject, campaign-html, campaign-next-2, campaign-save-draft. Nav testids: admin-nav-tickets / macros / campaigns / emailtpl / notiflog. Phase D is stable — proceed to Phase E.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in Phase D.
